assumptions: symmetric pair couplings for Hamiltonian evaluation
external fields separated from endogenised social couplings
executable_validation_targets: compute Hamiltonian energy for finite binary belief-state fixtures
measure magnetisation m and q_EA across matched disorder replicas
test ultrametric triplet inequality on final-state distance matrices
contrast coherence-optimising and engagement-optimising controller policies
null_controls: shuffle J_ij at fixed marginal weight distribution and require phase-signature degradation
set h_i to zero and separate external-field effects from endogenous couplings
compare ferromagnetic positive-coupling control against frustrated mixed-sign couplings
run matched disorder replicas before accepting q_EA or ultrametricity claims
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > The Genesis of Life - Abiogenesis as a Guided Phase Transition > Domain III & IV: Memory, Control, and Collective Coherence (Layers 9-12)
validation_targets: ultrametric clustering test under matched disorder replicas

variables.H: spin-glass Hamiltonian or social dissonance energy
variables.J_ij: effective social coupling between agents i and j
variables.h_i: media or AI-driven external field acting on agent i
variables.sigma_i: binary belief or agent state in {-1,+1}

assumptions: effective coupling remains within declared physical bounds
fixed-point claims require sign-change or zero-crossing evidence
executable_validation_targets: integrate finite beta_K fixtures across a declared scale grid
detect fixed point candidates and classify local stability
compare coarse-grained K_eff against microscopic coupling summaries
record scale, beta-function inputs, and boundary conditions in every result
null_controls: set beta_K to zero and require K_eff invariance over scale
use constant beta control and verify analytic logarithmic flow
reverse beta sign and require fixed-point stability classification to change
reject non-finite scales, non-positive mu, and unbounded K_eff trajectories
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > The Genesis of Life - Abiogenesis as a Guided Phase Transition > 1. Renormalisation Group (RG) Flow Across Domains
validation_targets: null beta-function and constant beta controls

variables.beta_K: beta function for the effective coupling
variables.omega: frequency or heterogeneity parameters entering the flow

summary.policy: Macro-transition anchors are promoted only into validation specifications. Provider submission remains out of scope until simulator fixtures, null controls, and source-to-result provenance pass.
